## Change

## Validation

- [ ] Pester passes in Windows PowerShell 5.1.
- [ ] Pester passes in PowerShell 7.
- [ ] PSScriptAnalyzer reports no errors.
- [ ] Non-elevated behavior was considered.
- [ ] No real incident evidence or customer data is included.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog are updated where required.
- [ ] Collection remains local and read-only.
